case_title: THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. vs. SPANGLER, LAYNE DBA TONITE'S THE NITE FLORIST et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
JUDGE WICK, REPORTER WAIVED C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF PRESENT, DEFT NOT PRESENT. PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED, JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. AND AGAINST DEFT. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPANGLER, LAYNE DBA TONITE'S THE NITE FLORIST $1,597.02 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $259.79 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,120.81

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPANGLER, LAYNE DBA TONITE'S THE NITE FLORIST $1,597.02 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $259.79 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,120.81, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
